{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032016544804A152551E501BECAFF7"}"},"total":3694},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7261995132126577466","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"该小说以探索生存进化以及不同的职业力量的主题，末世背景通常能够带来紧张刺激的情节和人性展示，尤其是当人们面临生死抉择时，职业的不同能力也能为故事带来丰富的战斗和冒险元素。它以增强现实的末世游戏的方式讲述了主角林凡在游戏病毒的帮助下成为游戏管理员，通过，聪明才智的方式猎杀了k231列车里边的全体变异体，行文流畅，作为一本新人新书来说，这是一本不错的选择。所以喜欢末世文的读者，千万不要错过这本书。最后一点，作者，你千万不要太监。","text_exts":[{"e":122,"s":119,"text":"管理员","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E5%91%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739968881BECAFF7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227261995132126577466%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227254820336586198073%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E5%91%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690815075,"group_id":"7254820336586198073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大梦初醒，流年似水","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9HTN67Z9bE2M6g9KlQ6JYY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529650&x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"668923977280576","user_name":"鎏黎之辈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"668923977280576","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1654270517,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254820336586198073","book_info":{"abstract":"【狩猎者：生命进化的过程，往往也是狩猎与被狩猎的过程！】
【侦察者：洞察世界本质，趋利避害！】
【神秘者：此刻，我即是天地！】
——
“你问我狩猎者、侦察者、神秘者哪个职业更强？”
“我还真说不清楚……”
“毕竟，我是游戏管理员，可以三职业同修，感觉都挺强的！”
末世游戏逐步降临现实。
眼前是太平盛世，身后是地狱深渊。
有人在杀戮之巅不断进化，寻求生的希望。
有人在阴暗角落瑟瑟发抖，祈祷上苍怜悯。
——
尸潮之下，众生平等。
长夜纪元，谁为主宰？
少年目光深邃的看着世界级BOSS：那熟悉的面孔与绝望的嘶吼。
